div.p: Target Query: Query<(&Position, &Velocity)> Rule: Iterate the component set with minimum cardinality; perform random access lookups on the larger set.

ul.li: Memory Alignment: All indices are u32 (4-byte alignment).
Sizing: Sparse arrays pre-allocated to MAX_ENTITIES.
Dynamic State: Re-evaluate heuristic if cardinality ratios cross 10% threshold.
